name: Birdie's Bar & Grill
about: Birdie's Bar & Grill is located at Pheasant Country Golf Course in South Heart, ND. It serves as both a full-service restaurant/bar and a golf simulator venue. The venue features a state-of-the-art indoor golf simulator and offers entertainment with multiple TVs. It caters to golfers and diners alike with a menu made from scratch, a full-service bar, and catering services. The facility is part of an 18-hole, par-71 golf course and offers various leagues and events.
why_golfers_like_it: Relaxing dining experience with full-service bar
Beautiful views of the golf course
Part of a premier 18-hole golf course
Multiple entertainment options with indoor and outdoor TVs

food_and_drink.notes: Diverse menu featuring breakfast, lunch, dinner, and homemade desserts; majority made from scratch; outdoor snack shack (seasonal)
Full-service bar; Happy Hour Wednesday-Friday from 3pm-6pm

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The page does not specify if club rentals are available. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for details on equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not mentioned as being allowed. The venue offers a full-service bar and a kitchen with a made-from-scratch menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The specific time for a simulator round is not mentioned. For the on-course 18-hole experience, the duration would depend on the pace of play and can vary.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as a cozy, family-friendly, indoor setting and offers youth golf programs, making it suitable for families.
